content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

December 8, 2005

Joseph E. Sullivan
Treasurer
Committee for Proposition N
2028 Ocean Front
Del Mar, CA 92014

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-236

Dear Mr. Sullivan:

This letter is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission has withdrawn your November 15, 2005, request for advice under the Political Reform Act¹ as you requested on November 30, 2005. Consequently, no written response will be prepared.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Lynda Cassady
Assistant Division Chief
Technical Assistance Division

LC:rd
I:\AdviceLtrs\05-236

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
